zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Lewknor於大約1410年出生在英國素可霍斯特德 凱恩斯時，他的父親Sir Thomas Lewknor19歲，母親Philippa Dalyngruge13歲。他於1437年9月1日與Alianor Camoys在英國英格蘭易亞斯特 素可巴爾可姆 克羅斯結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1442年在英國英格蘭素瑞被列為sheriff。他去世於1478年8月4日在英國享年69歲，埋葬在英國素可特洛頓。

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Lewknor was born about 1410, in Horsted Keynes, Sussex, England, his father, Sir Thomas Lewknor, was 19 and his mother, Philippa Dalyngruge, was 13. He married Alianor Camoys on 1 September 1437, in Barcombe Cross, East Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. In 1442, his occupation is listed as sheriff in Surrey, England, United Kingdom. He died on 4 August 1478, in England, at the age of 69, and was buried in Trotton, Sussex, England.

fr.Barcombe Cross, East Sussex, England: Barcombe Cross, East Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Lewknor est né environ 1410, à Horsted Keynes, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Lewknor, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Philippa Dalyngruge, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Alianor Camoys le 1 septembre 1437, à Barcombe Cross, East Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. En 1442, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff à Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 4 août 1478, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Trotton, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.Barcombe Cross, East Sussex, England: Barcombe Cross, East Sussex, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Lewknor um 1410 in Horsted Keynes, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Lewknor 19 und seine Mutter Philippa Dalyngruge 13. Er hat am 1. September 1437 in Barcombe Cross, East Sussex, England, United Kingdom Alianor Camoys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1442 ist sein Beruf als sheriff in Surrey, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 4. August 1478 im Alter von 69 Jahren in England und wurde in Trotton, Sussex, England begraben.

it.Barcombe Cross, East Sussex, England: Barcombe Cross, East Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito
it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Lewknor è nato il circa 1410 nel Horsted Keynes, Sussex, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Lewknor, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Philippa Dalyngruge, aveva 13 anni. Lui sposato Alianor Camoys il 1 settembre 1437, nel Barcombe Cross, East Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1442, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff nel Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 4 agosto 1478, nel England, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Trotton, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Lewknorが約1410年にイギリススセックスホールステド ケインスで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Lewknorは19歳，母Philippa Dalyngrugeは13歳であった。1437年9月1日にイギリスイギリスエアスト スセックスバーコンベ クロスでAlianor Camoysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1442年，イギリスイギリススリーでの職業はsheriffと記録されている。彼は1478年8月4日にイギリスで69歳で死去し，イギリススセックストロットオンにて埋葬された。

ko.Barcombe Cross, East Sussex, England: 영국 잉글랜드 이스트 수세스 바코브 크로스
ko.lifeSummary: Roger Lewknor(이)가 대략 1410년 영국 수세스 호르스테드 케인스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Lewknor(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Philippa Dalyngruge(은)는 13세였다. 그는 1437년 9월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 이스트 수세스 바코브 크로스에서 Alianor Camoys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1442년, 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 수리에서 sheriff이었다. 그는 1478년 8월 4일 영국에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 트로턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Lewknor nasceu aproximadamente 1410, em Horsted Keynes, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Lewknor, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Philippa Dalyngruge, tinha 13 anos. Ele casou-se com Alianor Camoys em 1 de setembro de 1437, em Barcombe Cross, East Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1442, sua profissão aparece como sheriff em Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 4 de agosto de 1478, em Inglaterra, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Trotton, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.Barcombe Cross, East Sussex, England: баркомб кросс, эаст суссекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Lewknor родился около 1410 г. в местности хаурстед кинесь, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Lewknor было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Philippa Dalyngruge, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Alianor Camoys 1 сентября 1437 г. в местности баркомб кросс, эаст суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. В 1442 году он работал по профессии sheriff в местности сурри, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 4 августа 1478 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности троттон, суссекс, Англия.

Se casó con Alianor Camoys el 1 de septiembre de 1437, en Barcombe Cross, East Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1442, su ocupación registrada era sheriff en Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 4 de agosto de 1478, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Trotton, Sussex, Inglaterra.
